headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on NXP Semiconductors, Raises Price Target to $370
summary: Citigroup  analyst Atif Malik   maintains NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $270 to $370.
